step_rationale: Regulates platelet activation and thrombosis signaling.
mechanism: SGK1 promotes platelet activation and thrombotic responses in acute coronary syndromes.

references.title: High expression of SGK1 in thrombosis of acute ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction: Based on proteomics analysis of intracoronary thrombosis.
references.journal: Revista portuguesa de cardiologia : orgao oficial da Sociedade Portuguesa de Cardiologia = Portuguese journal of cardiology : an official journal of the Portuguese Society of Cardiology
